steps.criteria: [NPC] Angler Angus: Whenever you fish, make sure you're using some type of Bait.

steps.instruction:
Buy Oak Logs &b%1%&r
Buy Sticks &b%2%&r
Buy Wooden Swords &b%3%&r
Buy Wooden Pickaxes &b%4%&r
Buy Wooden Shovel &b%5%&r
Buy Wooden Hoe &b%6%&r

Enchant items
&eGet splashed with grands
&eOR
&e1. Swap to main profile
&e2. Join a hub-selector hub
&e3. Throw a titanic in a corner
&e4. Collect xp on bingo profile

Buy Experience Bottle &b%1%&r
&cSave for experimentation table
Give All Skills Exp Boost to Bingo
steps.criteria: Your pet is now holding All Skills Exp Boost.
[NPC] Michael: Go talk to him if you want to learn more!
[NPC] Ike: Talk to me again if you want to check your progress!

steps.instruction:
Kill a Chicken &b%1%&r
Kill a Cow &b%2%&r
Kill a Pig &b%3%&r
Get a Carrot &b%4%&r
Get a Potato &b%5%&r
Get an Egg &b%6%&r

Add Silverfish to Pet Menu
&7(Hold item and Right-Click)
steps.criteria: Successfully added Silverfish to your pet menu!

steps.instruction: Apply Black Diamond to Golden Pickaxe
Apply Black Diamond to Golden Pickaxe
Apply Black Diamond to Golden Pickaxe

Get Bee Mask &b%1%&r
&7/bhskip if you can't be bothered

steps.criteria: [NPC] Lumber Jack: Cheers! Let me tell ya a little about what we're going to be doing.
[NPC] Lumber Jack: Nice job! In return for those logs, I'll give ya this Promising Axe.

steps.instruction:
Give Rhys Enchanted Coal
&c/warp mines if stuck

steps.criteria: [NPC] Fetchur: thanks thats probably what i needed

steps.has: You don't have enough Mithril Powder!

steps.instruction:
Find and kill a Star Sentry
&eAsk in chat and lobby-hop if necessary.
&c/bhskip if you've already killed one
Start a Tier I Rev Quest
Start a Tier II Rev Quest

Unlock Combat 12
&7Do &cTier III &7Revs if you have a
&7carrier otherwise do &eTier IIs

steps.criteria: [NPC] Charlie: Howdy! Yer a friend of Lumber Jack, are ya?
[NPC] Charlie: The Park is home to many different kinds of wood. Each kind has its own collection.
[NPC] Kelly: Hey hey! Did Charlie send you?
Select an option: [Yeah] [Never heard of him]
[NPC] Kelly: Oh, that's amazing! Thank you so much!
[NPC] Kelly: I've heard some people are holding a Cult Meeting there RIGHT NOW!
[NPC] Ryan: AAAHHHHH! Don't startle me like that bro!
[NPC] Ryan: Cool! Anyways, there's just one thing you have to do before you can join.
[NPC] Ryan: Yeah don't worry, it's not as hot as it looks.
TRIAL OF FIRE! Completed Trial of Fire I!
[NPC] Ryan: Thanks for the wood! Here's your badge, as promised!
[NPC] Ryan: But be careful, though, as each trial burns a little hotter than the last!
[NPC] Melody ♫: Yes, I'm fine, though my beloved Harp was broken to pieces by the storm.
[NPC] Melody ♫: Talk to me again if you ever want to give my Harp a try!
[NPC] Molbert: I watched the comings and goings in this park and it occurred to me that a very common problem plagues these areas.
Select an option: [Sure...] [You look like a mole yourself]
[NPC] Molbert: Great. First thing we need is to build some traps.

steps.instruction:
Give Logs to Molbert
&7(You might need to drop and
&7pick up logs to trigger quest)
steps.criteria: [NPC] Molbert: Fantastic, that's all I needed to build the traps.
[NPC] Romero: I'm.. trying to find gold...

steps.instruction:
Talk to Romero
&7(While holding Yellow Rock)

Talk to Juliette
&7(While holding Poorly Wrapped Gift)

Talk to Juliette
&7(While holding Rose Bouquet)

Talk to Juliette
&7(While holding Fake Emerald Altar)

Buy Wooden Axes &b%1%&r
Buy Birch Logs &b%2%&r

Add Bee to Pet Menu
&7(Hold item and Right-Click)
steps.criteria: Successfully added Bee to your pet menu!

Add Silverfish to Pet Menu
&7(Hold item and Right-Click)
steps.criteria: Successfully added Silverfish to your pet menu!
